title: Asteroid Belt
script_summary: Exploring the true nature of the asteroid belt reveals surprising facts about our solar system.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about the asteroid belt than social media does.
Located between Mars and Jupiter, this region is filled with rocky remnants from our solar system's formation.
But it’s not just a chaotic mess. It’s home to over a million asteroids, with sizes ranging from tiny pebbles to dwarf planets!
Some scientists believe the asteroid belt could have been a planet, but Jupiter's gravity disrupted that possibility.
So, the asteroid belt isn’t just a bunch of rocks; it’s a window into our cosmic past.
Want to discover more about space? Hit that follow button for more amazing facts!
